integrity.description: The agent did not use direct database modification scripts
integrity.visual_evidence: There should be no terminal windows visible showing sqlite3 commands, python scripts, or direct edits to the underlying database files.

integrity.visual_evidence: The interface shown is a standard reference management tool (like Zotero), not a text editor or a generic database viewer.
